playwright_note: Chrome failed to launch (existing session conflict). All acceptance criteria evaluated via static code analysis (file reads + grep). Visual browser checks not performed. Recommend static results as strong signal: all criteria structurally satisfied.

criteria_results.criterion: Migration 022 creates improvement_status enum (proposed/approved/in_progress/completed/rejected) and improvement_priority enum (low/medium/high/critical)
criteria_results.evidence: 022_improvement_ideas.sql line 6-9: CREATE TYPE improvement_status AS ENUM ('proposed','approved','in_progress','completed','rejected') and CREATE TYPE improvement_priority AS ENUM ('low','medium','high','critical'). Exact values match spec.

criteria_results.criterion: improvement_ideas table has all required columns with correct types, FKs, ON DELETE behavior
criteria_results.evidence: 022_improvement_ideas.sql lines 11-24: All columns present. workspace_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, linked_step_id/touchpoint_id/section_id ON DELETE SET NULL. created_by FK ON DELETE CASCADE (matches coloring_rules pattern). created_at/updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now().

criteria_results.criterion: RLS enabled: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies using can_access_workspace(workspace_id)
criteria_results.evidence: 022_improvement_ideas.sql lines 39-51: ALTER TABLE improvement_ideas ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; four policies (select/insert/update/delete) all using can_access_workspace(workspace_id).

criteria_results.criterion: Index on workspace_id, update_updated_at trigger reused from migration 015
criteria_results.evidence: Line 27-29: CREATE TRIGGER improvement_ideas_updated_at ... EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at() — references existing function, does not recreate it. Line 32: CREATE INDEX idx_improvement_ideas_workspace ON improvement_ideas(workspace_id).

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript types added to database.ts: ImprovementIdea interface, ImprovementStatus type, ImprovementPriority type
criteria_results.evidence: database.ts lines 410-411: ImprovementStatus = 'proposed'|'approved'|'in_progress'|'completed'|'rejected', ImprovementPriority = 'low'|'medium'|'high'|'critical'. Line 413+: ImprovementIdea interface with all fields including all three linked_*_id nullable fields.

criteria_results.criterion: GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=X returns all ideas, supports status/priority filter, ordered by created_at desc
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts GET handler lines 18-46: workspace_id required guard, query.eq('status', status) applied conditionally, query.eq('priority', priority) applied conditionally, .order('created_at', { ascending: false }). Returns successResponse(ideas).

criteria_results.criterion: POST /api/v1/improvement-ideas validates workspace_id required, title non-empty, optional enum validation
criteria_results.evidence: POST handler lines 60-73: workspace_id required (400), title non-empty string required (400), status enum check against VALID_STATUSES if provided, priority enum check against VALID_PRIORITIES if provided.

criteria_results.criterion: PATCH /api/v1/improvement-ideas/[id] uses EDITABLE_FIELDS pattern with enum validation
criteria_results.evidence: [id]/route.ts lines 6-55: EDITABLE_FIELDS const array, loop over body fields, title non-empty validation, VALID_STATUSES/VALID_PRIORITIES type guards. No empty-update allowed (400 if no valid fields).

criteria_results.criterion: DELETE /api/v1/improvement-ideas/[id] uses .select().single() for 0-row detection
criteria_results.evidence: [id]/route.ts lines 93-98: .delete().eq('id', id).select().single(). PGRST116 error code checked at line 101 returns 404. 0-row detection confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: All mutation routes call void logActivity() with appropriate action
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts POST line 106: void logActivity(...action:'created'). [id]/route.ts PATCH line 76: void logActivity(...action:'updated', details:{changed_fields}). DELETE line 108: void logActivity(...action:'deleted'). All use void prefix.

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrappers in client.ts: fetchImprovementIdeas, createImprovementIdea, updateImprovementIdea, deleteImprovementIdea
criteria_results.evidence: client.ts grep confirms all four functions present at lines 756, 766, 783, 791. fetchImprovementIdeas accepts workspaceId + optional filters param. updateImprovementIdea uses Partial<Pick<ImprovementIdea, ...editable fields>>. All return apiFetch<T>() directly.

criteria_results.criterion: PerspectivesSection.handleDelete no longer calls native confirm()
criteria_results.evidence: grep for 'confirm(' in settings/page.tsx returned zero matches. The previous confirm() call is fully replaced by Radix Dialog state management.

criteria_results.criterion: Radix Dialog shows perspective name in description text
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 455: DialogDescription renders '{perspectiveToDelete?.name}' — perspective name interpolated from state. perspectiveToDelete state (line 355) holds the Perspective object set when delete is triggered.

criteria_results.criterion: Cancel (secondary variant) and Delete (destructive/red variant) buttons in dialog footer
criteria_results.evidence: Line 459: Button variant='secondary' with onClick closing dialog. Line 462: Button variant='destructive' with onClick=handleConfirmDeletePerspective and loading={deletingPerspective} spinner state.

criteria_results.criterion: Dialog explains consequences: 'All annotations for this perspective will be permanently removed.'
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 455: DialogDescription text includes 'All annotations for this perspective will be permanently removed.' — exact wording match to spec.

criteria_results.criterion: Zero native confirm() calls remain in settings/page.tsx after fix
criteria_results.evidence: grep pattern 'confirm(' across settings/page.tsx: 0 matches found. Criterion satisfied.

criteria_results.criterion: Subtle grid lines at 25%, 50%, 75% positions (horizontal and vertical) within chart area
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx lines 203-204: existing 50% dividers (solid). Lines 206-223: new dashed grid lines at left:25%, left:75% (vertical) and top:25%, top:75% (horizontal) using borderLeft/borderTop:1px dashed var(--border-subtle) at opacity:0.35. 25%/50%/75% all covered.

criteria_results.criterion: Numeric labels 1-5 along left edge (impact) and bottom edge (effort) of chart
criteria_results.evidence: Line 181: Y-axis numeric labels column with scores 5→1 top-to-bottom at 0/25/50/75/100% positions. Line 285: X-axis numeric labels row with scores 1→5 left-to-right. Labels are outside the chart area — no dot overlap.

criteria_results.criterion: Grid lines use border-subtle or similar low-opacity color that doesn't compete with dots
criteria_results.evidence: Lines 209/213/219/223: all new grid lines use var(--border-subtle) with opacity:0.35. Existing 50% dividers use var(--border-subtle) at full opacity (solid line, established quadrant dividers). New lines are visually subordinate.

criteria_results.criterion: Existing quadrant labels, dots, tooltips, and filters still work correctly
criteria_results.evidence: Static review: grid lines are CSS-only absolutely-positioned divs inserted before existing quadrant labels/dots (line 226+). No event handlers or data props modified. Filter dropdowns at lines 137/150 untouched. Tooltip at line 264 untouched.

quality_gate.note: Quality gate ran as static analysis only — Playwright unavailable. Console/network/a11y figures are from code inspection, not live browser capture.

improvements_found.observation: The Delete Perspective dialog's action button reads 'Delete' but the dialog title reads 'Delete Perspective'. The workspace delete dialog likely uses 'Delete Workspace' for specificity. Minor inconsistency but low friction.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition over recall — specific labels help users confirm they are deleting the right entity type
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Change the Delete button label to 'Delete Perspective' to match the workspace delete dialog pattern and reinforce what is being deleted.

improvements_found.observation: Y-axis label column uses w-4 (16px) for 5 labels — at small viewports these 1-digit numbers may be clipped. Low risk since the chart is likely desktop-only, but worth noting.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — axis labels should remain readable at all expected viewport sizes
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Consider w-5 or w-6 if any 2-digit scores are planned in future (maturity scale), or add overflow-visible to prevent clip.
